sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91100" key="pteka/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτεκάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτάξ</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
